assignments.description: Kill the list Price, other wise the flow breaks
assignments.name: ass_32_Order_Item
assignments.label: 32. Order Item

Flow.description: Screen flow to Create a Credit Invoice from the current (selected) Invoice
Flow.label: scr - Invoice - Create Credit

fields.name: dt_01_Header
fields.fieldText: Confirmation Credit Invoice / Order(s) (This is a read only screen, however you can make changes, they will be ignored)

fields.name: sec_02_Exact_Description
fields.fieldText: Exact (Description is assigned toe the Invoice Notes)

value.stringValue: Object__c:0, Device__c:0, Product_Code__c:0, Product_Name__c:0, ServiceDate:0, EndDate:0, UnitPrice_Display__c:0

fields.name: dt_02_Warning
fields.fieldText: No Invoice Lines selected, no credit invoic/order(s) needed

fields.name: cb_01_Create_As_Draft
fields.helpText: Only persons with the Permission 'cp_miInvoiceCreatedFull Can change this value

validationRule.errorMessage: You don't have the permission, to change this setting

fields.name: sec_01_Exact_Description
fields.fieldText: Exact (Description is assigned toe the Invoice Notes)

fields.name: pl_01_Reseller
fields.helpText: The Reseller of the current invoice, changes will be ommited!

fields.name: dt_01_Warning
fields.fieldText: No Invoice Lines available to create credit invoices from
